visual_description: The scene opens in a modern office where a man in a white shirt and black tie stands with his hands on his hips, watching a monitor that displays a person in another room. The view then shifts to two seated men, one in a police-style uniform with epaulets and another in a light blue shirt, both looking downward or forward with serious expressions. The camera briefly blurs past a glass partition before focusing on the man in the light blue shirt, who appears to be listening attentively.
audio_description: the audio is quiet with no clear speech or background noise
